title: Afrolimon amoenum

Its classification as a member of the Rutaceae family provides insights into its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the same family.

Limonium is a type of flowering plant commonly known as sea lavender. It is a succulent, shrub-like plant native to coastal areas.
